title: NACP Settlement Reference
description: Reference to an external payment, escrow, credit, receipt, or settlement system. NACP does not move money or define a payment rail; this object only carries pointers to whatever external system actually settled the contract.

system.description: Opaque identifier for the external system (e.g. 'stripe', 'lightning', 'internal_credit_ledger', or implementation-namespaced).

amount_quoted.description: String-encoded decimal amount (avoids floating-point ambiguity). Optional.

currency.description: Currency or unit (e.g. 'USD', 'USDC', 'CREDIT'). Opaque to NACP.
